_meta.description: MTM spec display profiles — presentation-layer only. Registry source data is never modified. Profiles define the ordered fields shown in dealer-facing listing views.
notes: Three display tiers: essential / standard / technical. Field counts vary by equipment type.
'full' profile removed in v2.0. Registry stores ~28–31 fields internally; profiles control what is surfaced.
Null or missing field values are always skipped — no blank labels ever rendered.
Field order within each profile is intentional and must be preserved by the resolver.
tail_swing_type: skid_steer/CTL use short keys (radial/zero/reduced). Mini excavator and excavator use descriptive keys (zero_tail_swing, conventional_tail_swing, reduced_tail_swing).
breakout_force_lbf not in current skid_steer/CTL canonical schema — omitted from those profiles.
mini_excavator profile uses aux_flow_primary_gpm (canonical registry field name, not aux_flow_standard_gpm).

wheel_loader / excavator / telehandler use canonical display-layer names (horsepower_hp, operating_weight_lbs, travel_speed_mph). Registry source fields that differ must be mapped at ingest — not in profiles.
operating_weight_lb (no s) in telehandler/wheel_loader registries maps to canonical operating_weight_lbs.
engine_hp / net_power_hp / gross_power_hp in source registries map to canonical horsepower_hp.
bucket_capacity_cy in source registries maps to canonical bucket_capacity_yd3.

skid_steer locked standard 2026-04-10: excluded fields are travel_speed_high_mph, hydraulic_pressure_standard_psi, hydraulic_pressure_high_psi, dump_height_in, dump_reach_in, engine_model, engine_manufacturer. width_over_tires_in and bucket_hinge_pin_height_in are conditional-core (standard+ only, shown when present). high_flow and two_speed unit config comes from DealerInput (Python pipeline) — not present in registry record.specs; render_feature_flags suppresses high_flow_available/two_speed_available for skid_steer.

essential.description: Headline spec card — eight core buyer-decision fields. Locked standard 2026-04-10: travel_speed, hydraulic_pressure, dump_height excluded. width_over_tires and hinge_pin are conditional-core (standard+ only).

standard.description: Default listing view — ten fields. Locked standard 2026-04-10: travel_speed and hydraulic_pressure removed. width_over_tires and hinge_pin are conditional-core (shown only when present in record).

technical.description: Detail page view — eleven fields. Locked standard 2026-04-10: travel_speed, dump_height, hydraulic_pressure_standard, hydraulic_pressure_high removed as excluded fields.

compact_track_loader._lock_note: LOCKED standard 2026-04-10. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py _CTL_FIELDS. Banned from buyer-facing output: operating_weight_lbs, travel_speed_high_mph, emissions_tier, aux_flow_high_gpm, tipping_load_lbs, hydraulic_pressure_standard_psi, hydraulic_pressure_high_psi, dump_height_in, fuel_capacity_gal. high_flow and two_speed are confirm-required unit booleans from DealerInput — not inferred from high_flow_available / two_speed_available registry flags.

essential.description: Headline spec card — core buyer-decision fields. Locked standard 2026-04-10.

standard.description: Default listing view — core + conditional-core fields per locked CTL standard 2026-04-10.

technical.description: Detail page view — all standard fields for technically-oriented buyers. Locked CTL standard 2026-04-10.

essential.description: Headline spec card — eight key buyer-decision fields for mini excavators.

standard.description: Default listing view — twelve fields covering the specs most mini excavator buyers compare.

technical.description: Detail page view — fifteen fields for technically-oriented mini excavator buyers.

essential.description: Headline spec card — five key buyer-decision fields for wheel loaders.

standard.description: Default listing view — nine fields covering the specs most wheel loader buyers compare.

technical.description: Detail page view — thirteen fields for technically-oriented wheel loader buyers.

excavator._lock_note: LOCKED standard 2026-04-10. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py _LARGE_EX_FIELDS. Banned from buyer-facing output: engine_manufacturer, engine_model, emissions_tier, cab_type, boolean aux_hydraulics.

essential.description: Headline spec card — four key buyer-decision fields for large excavators.

standard.description: Default listing view — core and conditional-core fields per locked large excavator standard.

technical.description: Detail page view — all standard fields plus additional OEM specs for large excavators.

telehandler._lock_note: LOCKED standard 2026-04-13. lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs promoted to standard buyer-facing tier. cab_type and has_stabilizers added as listing/config fields (DealerInput injection). Runtime authority is mtm_service.py _SPEC_DISPLAY_LEVELS. Null/unknown fields suppressed at render.

essential.description: Headline spec card — five primary buyer-decision fields for telehandlers.

standard.description: Default listing view — eleven fields. Locked standard 2026-04-13: lift_capacity_at_full_height_lbs promoted from technical-only. cab_type suppressed when null. has_stabilizers suppressed when null.

technical.description: Detail page view — fifteen fields for technically-oriented telehandler buyers.

backhoe_loader._lock_note: Added 2026-04-15. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py SPEC_LEVEL_FIELDS backhoe_loader block. Field names here are raw registry keys (JS renderer reads registry record.specs directly). backhoe_bucket_force_lbf and loader_bucket_capacity_yd3 are registry-canonical for backhoe breakout/bucket.

essential.description: Headline spec card — five core buyer-decision fields for backhoe loaders.

standard.description: Default listing view — seven fields covering the specs most backhoe buyers compare.

technical.description: Detail page view — nine fields for technically-oriented backhoe buyers.

dozer._lock_note: Added 2026-04-15. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py SPEC_LEVEL_FIELDS crawler_dozer block. Equipment_type=dozer maps to crawler_dozer in Python pipeline. Field names here are raw registry keys.

essential.description: Headline spec card — four core buyer-decision fields for crawler dozers.

standard.description: Default listing view — six fields covering the specs most dozer buyers compare.

technical.description: Detail page view — eight fields for technically-oriented dozer buyers.

boom_lift._lock_note: Added 2026-04-15. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py SPEC_LEVEL_FIELDS boom_lift block. Field names here are raw registry keys (JS renderer reads registry record.specs directly). operating_weight_lbs uses registry spelling (with s) for JS path; Python path uses operating_weight_lb (remapped by _SPEC_KEY_MAP).

essential.description: Headline spec card — four primary buyer-decision fields for boom lifts.

standard.description: Default listing view — six fields covering the specs most boom lift buyers compare.

technical.description: Detail page view — seven fields for technically-oriented boom lift buyers.

scissor_lift._lock_note: Added 2026-04-15. Runtime authority is mtm_service.py SPEC_LEVEL_FIELDS scissor_lift block. Field names here are raw registry keys. operating_weight_lbs uses registry spelling (with s) for JS path.

essential.description: Headline spec card — five primary buyer-decision fields for scissor lifts.

standard.description: Default listing view — six fields covering the specs most scissor lift buyers compare.
